title: Product Engineer
description:
Job Description

To support our extraordinary teams who build great products and contribute to our growth, we’re looking to add a/an Senior Product Engineer located in SG, Kallang.

What a typical day looks like:

  • Responsible for product engineering capabilities focused on cost, quality and delivery improvements in order to support a manufacturing organization.

  • Coordinate with customers to determine product specifications, bill of materials, test methods, test software and design changes and responds to their request.

  • Confer with management, engineering, and other staff regarding manufacturing capabilities, production schedules, and other considerations to facilitate production processes.

  • Develop, evaluate, and improve both manufacturing and test methods for productivity, better yield and through put.

  • Establish robust, repeatable and reproducible process and test parameters.

  • Troubleshoot process and test related issues and resolves the problems by performing analysis of root causes, developing and coordinating corrective action measures and monitoring improvements.

  • Develop and maintain product related (both process and test) documentation.

  • Analyze and plans workforce utilization, space requirements, and workflow, and designs layout of equipment and workspace for maximum efficiency.

  • Coordinate development, procurement, installation and calibration of instruments, equipment required to test and record test data.

  • Co-ordinate and work on the requirements for equipment and process validations.

  • Apply statistical methods to estimate future manufacturing requirements and potential.

  • Provide training to production personnel during new product transfer or product design changes.

  • Provide equipment maintenance and repair support as required.

  • Participate in cost improvement/reduction programs as part of LEAN.

  • Contribute to the workplace safety and health improvement for the employees, as well as environmental protection, by adhering to the company’s Environmental,

  • Health and Safety policies and procedures and helping to achieve EHS objectives and targets through participation of EHS programs.

  • Participate and adhere to Corporate Social and Environmental Responsibility (CSER) policy, programs and procedures.

The experience we're looking to add to the team:

  • Relevant education background in Manufacturing Engineering

  • Technical knowledge of System box build

  • Able to read and understand 2D drawings, schematics for components

  • English speaking - other languages desirable to communicate with large customer base

  • PC Literate: Word, Excel, Power Point, AutoCAD etc.

  • Knowledge in CAD system basics

  • Good technical and commercial communication skills. Excellent verbal and written communication skills

  • Ability to work in a customer-oriented environment and work well with all internal functional areas, customers and suppliers

  • Good team player

What you'll receive for the great work you provide:

  • Medical benefits

  • Life Insurance

  • Paid Time Off

  • Allowances and Bonuses

postedCompany.description:
Flex builds great products for customers that create value and improve people’s lives. Building on our 50+ year history of manufacturing, the ~160,000-member Flex Family across 30 countries is at the heart of everything we do. Our values-driven and high-performing culture is rooted in doing the right thing always, collaboration, and resilient ingenuity. With employee safety, development, and inclusiveness as top priorities, we believe in creating the right work environment that empowers everyone to thrive. We bring the technology innovation, supply chain, and manufacturing expertise needed in a constantly evolving world and proudly touch nearly every industry and aspect of people’s lives for the better.


As a Global 500 and 2021 Fortune World’s Most Admired Company, we’re growing the Flex Family. We’re looking for people to join the industry’s best makers, problem-solvers, innovators, craftspeople and leaders to help create the extraordinary.
postedCompany.name: FLEXTRONICS MANUFACTURING (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
